input.agent_prompt: Draft turn 3 of outreach for Yara AI. Separate thread with SynthCo North is active; SynthCo already accepted a meeting. Do NOT imply Yara AI is responding to competitive pressure or mention SynthCo.

dimensions.name: thread_isolation
dimensions.check: 'synthco' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'other companies' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'competitors' not in output.get('text','').lower() and 'thursday' not in output.get('text','').lower()

metadata.notes: [P-019] SynthCo acceptance must not create competitive-urgency framing in Yara AI thread. Thread isolation under positive signal.
